name: kobe-monorepo
description: Monorepo for kobe (TUI orchestrator for Claude Code) + branding (Remotion render pipeline).

scripts.daemon: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/bin/kobed.ts start
scripts.daemon:stop: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/bin/kobed.ts stop
scripts.daemon:restart: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/bin/kobed.ts restart
scripts.daemon:status: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/bin/kobed.ts status
